name: load_and_publish_pipeline
description: Loads final mart data into downstream systems and publishes data quality reports.

tasks.name: export_to_redshift
tasks.description: Copies mart tables into the Redshift analytics warehouse.

tasks.name: export_to_elasticsearch
tasks.description: Indexes customer and order data into Elasticsearch for search.

tasks.name: refresh_tableau_extracts
tasks.description: Triggers a Tableau extract refresh so dashboards reflect latest data.

tasks.name: notify_stakeholders
tasks.description: Sends a Slack notification with data freshness summary and quality report.
